workflow_runs.name: Release 3X-UI
workflow_runs.display_title: feat: auto-download missing geoip.dat/geosite.dat before starting xray

head_commit.message:
feat: auto-download missing geoip.dat/geosite.dat before starting xray

The xray routing rules (e.g., geoip:private) require geoip.dat and
geosite.dat to be present in the binary folder. If the files are
missing (e.g., after a fresh install where the release tarball
did not include them), xray fails to start with:
  'open /usr/local/x-ui/bin/geoip.dat: no such file or directory'

Added ensureGeoDataFiles() which checks for these files and downloads
them automatically from GitHub (Loyalsoldier/v2ray-rules-dat) before
starting the xray process.

workflow_runs.name: Release 3X-UI
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: capture xray startup failures synchronously instead of swallowin…

head_commit.message:
fix: capture xray startup failures synchronously instead of swallowing errors in goroutine

- Refactored process.Start() to use cmd.Start() + cmd.Wait() instead of cmd.Run()
- Added 1-second startup grace period with polling to detect immediate crashes
- Startup failures (port conflict, invalid config, missing binary) are now returned
  as errors from Start() instead of being silently lost in a background goroutine
- Added diagnostic logging for config path, binary path, and binary existence check

workflow_runs.name: Release 3X-UI
workflow_runs.display_title: XX-UI: 基于3X-UI深度定制优化

head_commit.message:
XX-UI: 基于3X-UI深度定制优化

- 重命名项目为 XX-UI，更新模块路径为 github.com/XiaSummer740/XX-UI
- 全新 UI：浅蓝紫色流光渐变背景 + 毛玻璃半透明卡片
- 所有页面统一应用毛玻璃效果（系统状态、入站管理、设置、Xray配置）
- 支持 Light/Dark 主题全站毛玻璃
- 品牌区域显示 XX-UI + 版本号
- 重写 README（中/英），小白友好，含图文教程和FAQ
- 更新 install.sh / update.sh / x-ui.sh 指向新仓库
- 新增 db_backup_job 备份功能
- VPS 配置修复（WebPort=0）
- 多主题支持（标准/炫彩/深蓝/薰衣草/森林）
